message:
feat(ingest): add operational telemetry counters to PaneRegistry and StreamIngester [ft-3kxe.8]

Add IngestTelemetry struct with monotonic counters for discovery_ticks,
panes_discovered, panes_closed, generation_changes, metadata_changes,
and panes_filtered. Wire into PaneRegistry.discovery_tick() for automatic
recording. Add StreamIngesterTelemetrySnapshot for stream path telemetry.

Both snapshot types implement Serialize/Deserialize for pipeline export.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
